stories.title: How worried should fans be? Is a salary cap (and f...
stories.summary: Why is the league pushing for a cap -- and why is the MLBPA so opposed? Here's what you need to know as baseball's CBA battle begins.

stories.title: Sources: Knicks' Robinson to play after surgery
stories.summary: Knicks center Mitchell Robinson has undergone surgery on his broken right pinkie finger and plans to play in Game 1 of the NBA Finals while wearing a brace on his hand, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Spurs roll past Thunder as WCF head to Game 7
stories.summary: With the Spurs facing elimination, Victor Wembanyama led the charge with 28 points and 10 rebounds in a 118-91 blowout of the Thunder to send the Western Conference finals to a Game 7.

stories.title: 4-time Cup champ Claude Lemieux dies at 60
stories.summary: Claude Lemieux, who won the Stanley Cup four times during a memorable NHL career, died Thursday at age 60. Authorities said Lemieux died by suicide.

stories.title: McGuire: TTU willing to play Texas in Week 1
stories.summary: After Texas coach Steve Sarkisian made headlines by torching Texas Tech's strength of schedule, Red Raiders coach Joey McGuire shot back with an open invitation for the Horns to pay a visit to Lubbock.
